postText:
One thing of note: 

Far more solar projects underwent ESA formal consultations during this period than underwent NEPA EISs/EAs.

Same thing with wind. https://t.co/2I2a90mJgF
keyFindings: The query results identify 55 formal consultation records specifically filtered for 'solar' and 'power generation' projects.

Consultation timelines for the visible solar projects vary significantly, ranging from a minimum of 112 days for the Genesis Solar Energy Project to a maximum of 332 days for the North Bay Regional Water Treatment Plant Solar.
The Bureau of Land Management (BLM) is the lead agency for 7 of the 9 visible solar power projects, primarily located in California and Nevada.
Despite differences in project duration and the number of species impacted (ranging from 1 to 4), all visible records are classified as 'Standard' complexity.
Visible records show project starts beginning in late 2009 with several major conclusions occurring in the second half of 2010.
